diagrams.title: System Context
diagrams.description: End-to-end system context for PROD, DEV, control plane, worktrees, merge queue, promotion, GitHub Actions, and runtime.

diagrams.title: Lane Permission Model
diagrams.description: Capability matrix showing what PROD normal mode, PROD slash mode, DEV stage mode, DEV integration mode, and PROD promotion mode may do.

diagrams.title: PROD Handoff Sequence
diagrams.description: Sequence from normal PROD work to temporary slash handoff and enqueue-only DEV queue insertion.

diagrams.title: PROD To DEV Handoff Sequence
diagrams.description: Broader sequence from normal PROD work through temporary handoff, DEV worker materialization, and stage chat binding.

diagrams.title: Backlog Stage Lifecycle
diagrams.description: Lifecycle for backlog items, stage execution, user validation, integration, and promotion readiness.

diagrams.title: Backlog Stage State Machine
diagrams.description: Compact state machine for DEV backlog items, stage execution, validation, integration, and promotion readiness.

diagrams.title: Stage Worktree Topology
diagrams.description: Branch, worktree, backend, app, and chat isolation topology for parallel DEV specs.

diagrams.title: Worktree Topology
diagrams.description: Branch, worktree, backend-instance, merge-gate, and promotion-gate topology for parallel DEV specs.

diagrams.title: DEV Agent Review Loop
diagrams.description: Generator and Reviewer auto-chain inside one stage-bound DEV chat.

diagrams.title: DEV Main Merge Queue
diagrams.description: Serialized stage branch integration into dev/main with preflight, conflict, validation, and rollback gates.

diagrams.title: Promotion Pipeline
diagrams.description: Gate-by-gate promotion flowchart from dev/main to PROD with release and validation gates.

diagrams.title: Promotion State Machine
diagrams.description: Deterministic promotion state machine from dev/main to PROD with release and validation gates.

diagrams.title: PROD Promotion Sequence
diagrams.description: End-to-end promotion sequence across validation, approval, drain, backend deploy, app release, and post-validation.

diagrams.title: Release Channel Deployment
diagrams.description: Distinct DEV and PROD APK channels, visual identity, API URLs, updater channels, and backend identity validation.

diagrams.title: Control Plane Data Model
diagrams.description: Full control-plane data model for environments, handoffs, backlog, stages, runs, merge queue, promotion, validation, and releases.

diagrams.title: Observability Evidence Model
diagrams.description: Control-plane evidence model for handoffs, stages, runs, merges, promotions, and release artifacts.

diagrams.title: Stage Runtime Isolation
diagrams.description: Per-stage backend process, port, data dir, logs, PID, env file, and chat routing isolation.

diagrams.title: PROD Backend Update Gate
diagrams.description: Automatic PROD backend update eligibility, waiting-for-idle notification, force restart, validation, and user acknowledgement.

plans.title: Environment Isolation And Permission Model
plans.description: Define environment identity, capability rules, and PROD hard-denial behavior.

tasks.title: T001 Define environment identity schema
tasks.description: Represent PROD, DEV, control plane, stage, channel, backend URL, app label, and allowed capabilities.

tasks.title: T002 Define deterministic permission matrix
tasks.description: Define allowed and denied operations for every operating mode.

tasks.title: T003 Add backend environment identity source
tasks.description: Expose identity in health/config payloads for frontend and tools.

tasks.title: T004 Enforce PROD normal-mode denial
tasks.description: Block writes, commands, restarts, deploys, and DEV workspace reads.

tasks.title: T005 Test PROD isolation
tasks.description: Prove PROD normal sessions cannot access mutation capabilities or DEV context.

tasks.title: T006 Document isolation rules
tasks.description: Document operator rules without injecting context into normal PROD agents.

plans.title: PROD Slash Handoff And DEV Queue
plans.description: Create enqueue-only handoff mode from PROD to the DEV queue.

tasks.title: T007 Define slash handoff contract
tasks.description: Load temporary context only when the user invokes the action.

tasks.title: T008 Implement queue payload schema
tasks.description: Validate immutability, idempotency, and environment checks.

tasks.title: T009 Add enqueue-only backend endpoint/tool
tasks.description: Accept handoffs without granting mutation permissions.

tasks.title: T010 Add frontend slash/action UI
tasks.description: Enter and exit temporary plan/handoff mode.

tasks.title: T011 Test slash permission limits
tasks.description: Verify enqueue works and edits/commands/restarts/DEV launches fail.

tasks.title: T012 Add handoff audit records
tasks.description: Persist source session, selected context, item id, and redacted evidence.

plans.title: DEV Backlog Spec Materialization
plans.description: Claim queued handoffs and materialize them into DEV SDD specs.

tasks.title: T013 Define DEV backlog states
tasks.description: Define claim, retry, cancellation, and terminal-state behavior.

tasks.title: T014 Implement DEV worker import
tasks.description: Materialize handoffs only in DEV workspaces.

tasks.title: T015 Implement spec attachment rules
tasks.description: Attach to existing specs or create new specs deterministically.

tasks.title: T016 Store delivery state outside metadata.status
tasks.description: Keep runtime state separate from SDD lifecycle.

tasks.title: T017 Add Workbench/Kanban visibility
tasks.description: Show queued, materialized, blocked, and active backlog states.

tasks.title: T018 Test materialization
tasks.description: Cover duplicate handoffs, races, blockers, and projection.

plans.title: Stage Registry Worktrees And Chat Binding
plans.description: Bind each DEV spec chat to one registered branch and worktree.

tasks.title: T019 Define Stage Registry schema
tasks.description: Represent stage id, spec id, branch, worktree, base branch, backend URL, channel, status, and owner.

tasks.title: T020 Implement branch/worktree creation
tasks.description: Create or reuse one branch/worktree per spec stage.

tasks.title: T021 Bind DEV chats to stages
tasks.description: Persist stage metadata on sessions.

tasks.title: T022 Add mismatch guards
tasks.description: Reject actions when workspace, branch, or worktree diverges from registry.

tasks.title: T023 Render DEV stage header
tasks.description: Show environment, spec, branch, worktree label, and backend URL source.

tasks.title: T024 Test parallel stages
tasks.description: Cover spec 017/spec 018 isolation, mismatch rejection, and chat continuity.

plans.title: DEV Agent Execution And Review Loop
plans.description: Reuse existing Generator/Reviewer auto-chain inside registered DEV stages.

tasks.title: T025 Define DEV stage AgentConfiguration presets
tasks.description: Set Generator/Reviewer pair budgets and optional Summary.

tasks.title: T026 Reuse MessageService auto-chain
tasks.description: Run Generator -> Reviewer -> Generator loops in the stage chat.

tasks.title: T027 Add Reviewer completion JSON contract
tasks.description: Allow Reviewer to continue or complete deterministically.

tasks.title: T028 Persist run evidence
tasks.description: Store changed files, tests, risks, user checklist, and reviewer state.

tasks.title: T029 Add DEV worker controls
tasks.description: Start, pause, cancel, retry, and resume stage agent runs.

tasks.title: T030 Test review loop behavior
tasks.description: Cover continue, complete, failed follow-up recovery, and final summary.

plans.title: DEV Main Merge Queue And Conflict Gates
plans.description: Serialize stage integration into dev/main with deterministic gates.

tasks.title: T031 Define merge queue schema
tasks.description: Represent stage branch integration into dev/main.

tasks.title: T032 Implement merge preflight
tasks.description: Check clean worktree, approval, reviewer, tests, and base freshness.

tasks.title: T033 Implement deterministic merge attempt
tasks.description: Capture conflicts and avoid partial integration.

tasks.title: T034 Run integration validation
tasks.description: Record commit, tests, SDD doctor, and blockers after merge.

tasks.title: T035 Add user-visible merge status
tasks.description: Show conflict remediation instructions in DEV Workbench.

tasks.title: T036 Test merge queue gates
tasks.description: Cover success, stale branch, conflict, dirty tree, failed validation, and serialization.

plans.title: Deterministic Promotion Orchestrator
plans.description: Promote dev/main to PROD through a backend-owned state machine and existing scripts.

tasks.title: T037 Define Promotion Orchestrator state machine
tasks.description: Define preflight, validation, approval, drain, deploy, release, post-validation, notify, blocked, failed, and rollback states.

tasks.title: T038 Wrap existing deterministic scripts
tasks.description: Use Android release, GitHub Actions, drain/restart, post-release validation, SDD doctor, and network checks.

tasks.title: T039 Add promotion API/tool
tasks.description: Accept validated parameters only and hide ad hoc shell/git/deploy commands from LLMs.

tasks.title: T040 Enforce PROD drain and approval gates
tasks.description: Block restart/release while jobs are active or approval is missing.

tasks.title: T041 Persist promotion evidence
tasks.description: Store logs, tags, release URLs, backend validation, update metadata, and rollback hints.

tasks.title: T042 Test promotion behavior
tasks.description: Cover blocked promotion, drain, failed validation, success, and no LLM command execution.

plans.title: PROD DEV App Release And Environment UI
plans.description: Make DEV and PROD apps visibly distinct and channel-safe.

tasks.title: T043 Define DEV/PROD release channels and UI identity
tasks.description: Define labels, badges, colors, API URLs, updater channels, and stage visibility.

tasks.title: T044 Add backend channel configuration
tasks.description: Support separate DEV/PROD app/update channels without mock/demo defaults.

tasks.title: T045 Add frontend environment banner
tasks.description: Render independent from existing CODEX DEV developer-mode signal.

tasks.title: T046 Build release validation
tasks.description: Verify labels, colors, API URLs, updater URLs, and environment identity.

tasks.title: T047 Update release workflow or wrapper
tasks.description: Support DEV and PROD channels safely.

tasks.title: T048 Test DEV/PROD UI distinction
tasks.description: Cover colors, badges, headers, and stage identity display.

plans.title: Validation Observability And Rollout
plans.description: Validate, observe, document, and roll out the complete workflow.

tasks.title: T049 Add end-to-end dry-run tests
tasks.description: Cover PROD handoff through promotion dry-run.

tasks.title: T050 Add observability and notifications
tasks.description: Expose backlog, stage, merge, promotion, release, and validation events.

tasks.title: T051 Add operator documentation
tasks.description: Document stages, backlog, merge, promotion, and recovery.

tasks.title: T052 Add existing-spec migration strategy
tasks.description: Handle untracked/pre-created specs such as spec 017.

tasks.title: T053 Add rollout flags
tasks.description: Enable DEV first and PROD handoff later.

tasks.title: T054 Run closeout validation dry-runs
tasks.description: Run regression suite, SDD doctor, release-network validation, and backend post-release validation dry-runs.

plans.title: Stage Runtime Isolation
plans.description: Give every DEV stage its own backend process, port, data dir, logs, env, PID, and health state.

tasks.title: T055 Define stage runtime schema
tasks.description: Represent backend URL, port, data dir, logs dir, PID file, env file, health, and restart policy.

tasks.title: T056 Implement deterministic per-stage port allocation
tasks.description: Allocate stable ports with collision detection and reuse.

tasks.title: T057 Implement stage backend lifecycle commands
tasks.description: Start, stop, restart, status, healthcheck, and log lookup for one registered stage.

tasks.title: T058 Bind DEV calls to stage backend URL
tasks.description: Route chat API calls and worker actions to the stage backend instead of a shared DEV backend.

tasks.title: T059 Render stage backend status
tasks.description: Show backend status, port, health, and last restart per chat in DEV.

tasks.title: T060 Test backend runtime isolation
tasks.description: Prove restart/failure of one stage backend does not affect another stage backend or chat.

plans.title: PROD Backend Update Idle Gate
plans.description: Apply prepared PROD backend updates automatically only when the full PROD agent and job chain is idle; otherwise show a persistent pending notice with force controls.

tasks.title: T061 Define PROD backend update state machine
tasks.description: Represent update_available, waiting_for_idle, auto_update_eligible, updating, updated_pending_ack, acknowledged, force_requested, blocked, and failed.

tasks.title: T062 Implement PROD quiescence detector
tasks.description: Detect active jobs, active_agent_run_id, queued/reserved turns, Generator/Reviewer/Summary follow-ups, SDD/Codex jobs, Project Factory jobs, and background tasks.

tasks.title: T063 Implement idle automatic backend update
tasks.description: Run the deterministic update only when no active or pending agent chain exists.

tasks.title: T064 Add persistent PROD update notification
tasks.description: Show waiting-for-idle, updating, updated, failed, and acknowledgement states without a modal pop-up.

tasks.title: T065 Add force restart/update action
tasks.description: Require strong confirmation and record interruption evidence, recovery summary, and post-update validation.

tasks.title: T066 Test PROD backend update gate
tasks.description: Cover idle auto-update, busy waiting, Generator-to-Reviewer pending chains, forced restart, failed validation, and acknowledgement dismissal.
